outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected: spot at gamma flip with negative GEX environment amplifying directional moves
outlook.summary: Spot pinned at gamma flip zone (687.5) with mixed GEX profile. 0DTE positive but weekly/monthly expiries show significant negative gamma (-3.85B combined). Dealers short gamma will amplify moves. Strong structural support at 670-680, major resistance at 700. Max Pain cluster 684-688 acts as magnetic zone.
